<!-- thanks for the pr. fill this in so we can review faster. -->

## what

one or two sentences on what this changes.

## why

what problem does it solve, or what feature does it add. link an issue if one exists.

## how

key implementation notes. anything that is not obvious from the diff.

## checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] no secrets in the diff
- [ ] touched zones tagged the right reviewers (`.github/CODEOWNERS`)
- [ ] updated `CHANGELOG.md` under unreleased if user-facing
- [ ] updated `ROADMAP.md` if this completes a milestone

## screenshots or logs

if the change affects output, paste a before and after.
